action_mappings.release_originating_ledger: release originating ledger {} from settlement case {}

action_mappings.unbind_communication_channel: unbind communication channel {} from settlement case {}

action_mappings.apply_approval_and_mark_channel: apply approval token {} and mark the communication channel for settlement case {}
action_mappings.run_validation_service: run validation service {} for settlement case {} using communication channel {}
action_mappings.run_endpoint_validation: run endpoint validation for settlement case {} using correspondent endpoint {}
action_mappings.reserve_beneficiary_correspondent: reserve beneficiary correspondent {} for settlement case {}
action_mappings.release_beneficiary_correspondent: release beneficiary correspondent {} from settlement case {}
action_mappings.reserve_nostro_account: reserve nostro account {} for settlement case {}
action_mappings.release_nostro_account: release nostro account {} from settlement case {}
action_mappings.reserve_currency_route: reserve currency route {} for settlement case {}
action_mappings.release_currency_route: release currency route {} from settlement case {}
action_mappings.schedule_execution_on_rail: schedule execution for settlement case {} on settlement rail {} using currency {} with beneficiary correspondent {}
action_mappings.schedule_execution_with_liquidity: schedule execution for settlement case {} on settlement rail {} using nostro account {} with liquidity reserve slot {}
action_mappings.record_validation_and_block: record validation and block for settlement case {} with currency {} and beneficiary correspondent {}
action_mappings.capture_manual_approval: capture manual approval for settlement case {} using currency {}, beneficiary correspondent {}, and routing profile domestic {}
action_mappings.capture_compliance_and_approval: capture compliance and approval for settlement case {} using nostro account {}, currency route {}, and routing profile international {}
action_mappings.authorize_settlement: authorize settlement for settlement case {} with currency {} and beneficiary correspondent {}
action_mappings.post_execution_update_after_authorizatio: post execution update for settlement case {} using communication channel {} and validation service {} after authorization
action_mappings.mark_ready_for_posting: mark settlement case {} ready for posting via communication channel {}
action_mappings.mark_ready_for_posting_with_manual_appro: mark settlement case {} ready for posting with approval token {}
action_mappings.bind_outgoing_case_to_endpoint: bind outgoing case for settlement case {} to correspondent endpoint {}
action_mappings.bind_incoming_to_outgoing_endpoint: bind incoming case {} to correspondent endpoint {} for outgoing case {}
action_mappings.set_routing_processing_flag: set routing processing flag for settlement case {} using communication channel {} and validation service {}
action_mappings.finalize_case_with_endpoint: finalize settlement case {} with correspondent endpoint {}

action_mappings_indef.create_settlement_case: create a settlement case {} as a registered case
action_mappings_indef.allocate_originating_ledger: allocate an originating ledger {} to a settlement case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_originating_ledger: release an originating ledger {} from a settlement case {}
action_mappings_indef.bind_communication_channel: bind a communication channel {} to a settlement case {}
action_mappings_indef.unbind_communication_channel: unbind a communication channel {} from a settlement case {}
action_mappings_indef.confirm_channel_binding: confirm the binding of a communication channel {} for a settlement case {}
action_mappings_indef.apply_approval_and_mark_channel: apply an approval token {} and mark the communication channel for a settlement case {}
action_mappings_indef.run_validation_service: run a validation service {} for a settlement case {} using a communication channel {}
action_mappings_indef.run_endpoint_validation: run endpoint validation for a settlement case {} using a correspondent endpoint {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_currency_for_case: reserve a currency {} for a settlement case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_currency_for_case: release a currency {} for a settlement case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_beneficiary_correspondent: reserve a beneficiary correspondent {} for a settlement case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_beneficiary_correspondent: release a beneficiary correspondent {} from a settlement case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_nostro_account: reserve a nostro account {} for a settlement case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_nostro_account: release a nostro account {} from a settlement case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_currency_route: reserve a currency route {} for a settlement case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_currency_route: release a currency route {} from a settlement case {}
action_mappings_indef.schedule_execution_on_rail: schedule execution for a settlement case {} on a settlement rail {} using a currency {} with a beneficiary correspondent {}
action_mappings_indef.schedule_execution_with_liquidity: schedule execution for a settlement case {} on a settlement rail {} using a nostro account {} with a liquidity reserve slot {}
action_mappings_indef.record_validation_and_block: record validation and block for a settlement case {} with a currency {} and a beneficiary correspondent {}
action_mappings_indef.capture_manual_approval: capture manual approval for a settlement case {} using a currency {}, a beneficiary correspondent {}, and a routing profile domestic {}
action_mappings_indef.capture_compliance_and_approval: capture compliance and approval for a settlement case {} using a nostro account {}, a currency route {}, and a routing profile international {}

action_mappings_indef.mark_ready_for_posting_with_manual_appro: mark a settlement case {} ready for posting with an approval token {}

action_mappings_indef.bind_incoming_to_outgoing_endpoint: bind an incoming case {} to a correspondent endpoint {} for an outgoing case {}

predicate_mappings.case_allocated_originating_ledger: {} is allocated to the originating ledger {}
predicate_mappings.case_originating_ledger_allocated: the originating ledger for {} is allocated
predicate_mappings.case_communication_channel_ready: the communication channel for {} is ready
predicate_mappings.incoming_case_endpoint_allowed: the incoming case {} is allowed at the correspondent endpoint {}
predicate_mappings.incoming_case_endpoint_bound: the incoming case {} is bound to the correspondent endpoint {}
predicate_mappings.case_routing_confirmed: the case routing for {} is confirmed
predicate_mappings.case_originating_ledger_allowed: the settlement case {} is allowed for the originating ledger {}
predicate_mappings.case_settlement_rail_allowed: the settlement case {} is allowed for the settlement rail {}
predicate_mappings.case_currency_allowed: the settlement case {} is allowed for the currency {}
predicate_mappings.case_correspondent_allowed: the settlement case {} is allowed for the beneficiary correspondent {}
predicate_mappings.case_nostro_allowed: the settlement case {} is allowed for the nostro account {}
predicate_mappings.case_liquidity_slot_allowed: the settlement case {} is allowed for the liquidity reserve slot {}
predicate_mappings.case_currency_route_allowed: the settlement case {} is allowed for the currency route {}
predicate_mappings.case_routing_profile_assigned: the settlement case {} is assigned to the routing profile {}
predicate_mappings.outgoing_case_endpoint_bound: the outgoing case endpoint for {} is bound to {}
predicate_mappings.case_communication_channel_bound: {} is bound to the communication channel {}

create_settlement_case.description: create a settlement case A as a registered case
preconditions: I can only create a settlement case A as a registered case if it is not the case that A is a registered case and it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I create a settlement case A as a registered case, it is the case that A is a registered case

allocate_originating_ledger.description: allocate an originating ledger B to a settlement case A
preconditions: I can only allocate an originating ledger B to a settlement case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and the originating ledger B is available and the settlement case A is allowed for the originating ledger B
I can only allocate an originating ledger B to a settlement case A if it is not the case that the originating ledger for A is allocated
effects: Once I allocate an originating ledger B to a settlement case A, it is the case that A is allocated to the originating ledger B and the originating ledger for A is allocated
Once I allocate an originating ledger B to a settlement case A, it is not the case anymore that the originating ledger B is available

release_originating_ledger.description: release an originating ledger B from a settlement case A
preconditions: I can only release an originating ledger B from a settlement case A if it is the case that A is allocated to the originating ledger B
I can only release an originating ledger B from a settlement case A if it is not the case that the execution for A is scheduled and it is not the case that the approval for A is recorded
effects: Once I release an originating ledger B from a settlement case A, it is the case that the originating ledger B is available

Once I release an originating ledger B from a settlement case A, it is not the case anymore that A is allocated to the originating ledger B and it is not the case anymore that the originating ledger for A is allocated and it is not the case anymore that the communication channel for A is ready and it is not the case anymore that A has been validated and it is not the case anymore that A has an approval flag and it is not the case anymore that A is authorized and it is not the case anymore that A has a post execution flag

bind_communication_channel.description: bind a communication channel B to a settlement case A
preconditions: I can only bind a communication channel B to a settlement case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and the communication channel B is available
effects: Once I bind a communication channel B to a settlement case A, it is the case that A is bound to the communication channel B
Once I bind a communication channel B to a settlement case A, it is not the case anymore that the communication channel B is available

unbind_communication_channel.description: unbind a communication channel B from a settlement case A
preconditions: I can only unbind a communication channel B from a settlement case A if it is the case that A is bound to the communication channel B
effects: Once I unbind a communication channel B from a settlement case A, it is the case that the communication channel B is available
Once I unbind a communication channel B from a settlement case A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the communication channel B

confirm_channel_binding.description: confirm the binding of a communication channel B for a settlement case A
preconditions: I can only confirm the binding of a communication channel B for a settlement case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and the originating ledger for A is allocated and A is bound to the communication channel B
I can only confirm the binding of a communication channel B for a settlement case A if it is not the case that the communication channel for A is ready
effects: Once I confirm the binding of a communication channel B for a settlement case A, it is the case that the communication channel for A is ready

apply_approval_and_mark_channel.description: apply an approval token B and mark the communication channel for a settlement case A
preconditions: I can only apply an approval token B and mark the communication channel for a settlement case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and the originating ledger for A is allocated and the approval token B is available
I can only apply an approval token B and mark the communication channel for a settlement case A if it is not the case that the communication channel for A is ready
effects: Once I apply an approval token B and mark the communication channel for a settlement case A, it is the case that the communication channel for A is ready and A has an approval flag
Once I apply an approval token B and mark the communication channel for a settlement case A, it is not the case anymore that the approval token B is available

run_validation_service.description: run a validation service C for a settlement case A using a communication channel B
preconditions: I can only run a validation service C for a settlement case A using a communication channel B if it is the case that the communication channel for A is ready and the originating ledger for A is allocated and A is bound to the communication channel B and the validation service C is available
I can only run a validation service C for a settlement case A using a communication channel B if it is not the case that A has been validated
effects: Once I run a validation service C for a settlement case A using a communication channel B, it is the case that A has been validated
Once I run a validation service C for a settlement case A using a communication channel B, it is not the case anymore that A has an approval flag

run_endpoint_validation.description: run endpoint validation for a settlement case A using a correspondent endpoint B
preconditions: I can only run endpoint validation for a settlement case A using a correspondent endpoint B if it is the case that the originating ledger for A is allocated and the incoming case A is bound to the correspondent endpoint B
I can only run endpoint validation for a settlement case A using a correspondent endpoint B if it is not the case that A has been validated
effects: Once I run endpoint validation for a settlement case A using a correspondent endpoint B, it is the case that A has been validated
Once I run endpoint validation for a settlement case A using a correspondent endpoint B, it is not the case anymore that A has an approval flag

reserve_currency_for_case.description: reserve a currency B for a settlement case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a currency B for a settlement case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and the currency B is available and the settlement case A is allowed for the currency B
effects: Once I reserve a currency B for a settlement case A, it is the case that B has been reserved for A
Once I reserve a currency B for a settlement case A, it is not the case anymore that the currency B is available

release_currency_for_case.description: release a currency B for a settlement case A
preconditions: I can only release a currency B for a settlement case A if it is the case that B has been reserved for A
effects: Once I release a currency B for a settlement case A, it is the case that the currency B is available
Once I release a currency B for a settlement case A, it is not the case anymore that B has been reserved for A

reserve_beneficiary_correspondent.description: reserve a beneficiary correspondent B for a settlement case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a beneficiary correspondent B for a settlement case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and the correspondent B is available and the settlement case A is allowed for the beneficiary correspondent B
effects: Once I reserve a beneficiary correspondent B for a settlement case A, it is the case that B has been reserved for A
Once I reserve a beneficiary correspondent B for a settlement case A, it is not the case anymore that the correspondent B is available

release_beneficiary_correspondent.description: release a beneficiary correspondent B from a settlement case A
preconditions: I can only release a beneficiary correspondent B from a settlement case A if it is the case that B has been reserved for A
effects: Once I release a beneficiary correspondent B from a settlement case A, it is the case that the correspondent B is available
Once I release a beneficiary correspondent B from a settlement case A, it is not the case anymore that B has been reserved for A

reserve_nostro_account.description: reserve a nostro account B for a settlement case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a nostro account B for a settlement case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and the nostro account B is available and the settlement case A is allowed for the nostro account B
effects: Once I reserve a nostro account B for a settlement case A, it is the case that B has been reserved for A
Once I reserve a nostro account B for a settlement case A, it is not the case anymore that the nostro account B is available

release_nostro_account.description: release a nostro account B from a settlement case A
preconditions: I can only release a nostro account B from a settlement case A if it is the case that B has been reserved for A
effects: Once I release a nostro account B from a settlement case A, it is the case that the nostro account B is available
Once I release a nostro account B from a settlement case A, it is not the case anymore that B has been reserved for A

reserve_currency_route.description: reserve a currency route B for a settlement case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a currency route B for a settlement case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and the currency route B is available and the settlement case A is allowed for the currency route B
effects: Once I reserve a currency route B for a settlement case A, it is the case that B has been assigned to A
Once I reserve a currency route B for a settlement case A, it is not the case anymore that the currency route B is available

release_currency_route.description: release a currency route B from a settlement case A
preconditions: I can only release a currency route B from a settlement case A if it is the case that B has been assigned to A
effects: Once I release a currency route B from a settlement case A, it is the case that the currency route B is available
Once I release a currency route B from a settlement case A, it is not the case anymore that B has been assigned to A

schedule_execution_on_rail.description: schedule execution for a settlement case A on a settlement rail B using a currency C with a beneficiary correspondent D
preconditions: I can only schedule execution for a settlement case A on a settlement rail B using a currency C with a beneficiary correspondent D if it is the case that the originating ledger for A is allocated and C has been reserved for A and D has been reserved for A and the settlement rail B is available and the settlement case A is allowed for the settlement rail B
I can only schedule execution for a settlement case A on a settlement rail B using a currency C with a beneficiary correspondent D if it is not the case that the execution for A is scheduled
effects: Once I schedule execution for a settlement case A on a settlement rail B using a currency C with a beneficiary correspondent D, it is the case that B has been assigned to A and the execution for A is scheduled
Once I schedule execution for a settlement case A on a settlement rail B using a currency C with a beneficiary correspondent D, it is not the case anymore that the settlement rail B is available

schedule_execution_with_liquidity.description: schedule execution for a settlement case A on a settlement rail B using a nostro account C with a liquidity reserve slot D
preconditions: I can only schedule execution for a settlement case A on a settlement rail B using a nostro account C with a liquidity reserve slot D if it is the case that the originating ledger for A is allocated and C has been reserved for A and the liquidity reserve D is available and the settlement rail B is available and the settlement case A is allowed for the settlement rail B and the settlement case A is allowed for the liquidity reserve slot D
I can only schedule execution for a settlement case A on a settlement rail B using a nostro account C with a liquidity reserve slot D if it is not the case that the execution for A is scheduled
effects: Once I schedule execution for a settlement case A on a settlement rail B using a nostro account C with a liquidity reserve slot D, it is the case that B has been assigned to A and the execution for A is scheduled and A has a post execution flag and A has an approval flag

Once I schedule execution for a settlement case A on a settlement rail B using a nostro account C with a liquidity reserve slot D, it is not the case anymore that the settlement rail B is available and it is not the case anymore that the liquidity reserve D is available

record_validation_and_block.description: record validation and block for a settlement case A with a currency B and a beneficiary correspondent C
preconditions: I can only record validation and block for a settlement case A with a currency B and a beneficiary correspondent C if it is the case that the execution for A is scheduled and A has a post execution flag and B has been reserved for A and C has been reserved for A
effects: Once I record validation and block for a settlement case A with a currency B and a beneficiary correspondent C, it is not the case anymore that A has a post execution flag and it is not the case anymore that A has an approval flag

capture_manual_approval.description: capture manual approval for a settlement case A using a currency B, a beneficiary correspondent C, and a routing profile domestic D
preconditions: I can only capture manual approval for a settlement case A using a currency B, a beneficiary correspondent C, and a routing profile domestic D if it is the case that A has been validated and the execution for A is scheduled and B has been reserved for A and C has been reserved for A and the settlement case A is assigned to the routing profile D

I can only capture manual approval for a settlement case A using a currency B, a beneficiary correspondent C, and a routing profile domestic D if it is not the case that A has an approval flag and it is not the case that the approval for A is recorded
effects: Once I capture manual approval for a settlement case A using a currency B, a beneficiary correspondent C, and a routing profile domestic D, it is the case that the approval for A is recorded

capture_compliance_and_approval.description: capture compliance and approval for a settlement case A using a nostro account B, a currency route C, and a routing profile international D
preconditions: I can only capture compliance and approval for a settlement case A using a nostro account B, a currency route C, and a routing profile international D if it is the case that A has been validated and the execution for A is scheduled and B has been reserved for A and C has been assigned to A and the settlement case A is assigned to the routing profile D

I can only capture compliance and approval for a settlement case A using a nostro account B, a currency route C, and a routing profile international D if it is not the case that the approval for A is recorded
effects: Once I capture compliance and approval for a settlement case A using a nostro account B, a currency route C, and a routing profile international D, it is the case that the approval for A is recorded and A has an approval flag

authorize_settlement.description: authorize settlement for a settlement case A with a currency B and a beneficiary correspondent C
preconditions: I can only authorize settlement for a settlement case A with a currency B and a beneficiary correspondent C if it is the case that the approval for A is recorded and A has an approval flag and B has been reserved for A and C has been reserved for A
effects: Once I authorize settlement for a settlement case A with a currency B and a beneficiary correspondent C, it is the case that A is authorized

Once I authorize settlement for a settlement case A with a currency B and a beneficiary correspondent C, it is not the case anymore that A has an approval flag and it is not the case anymore that A has been validated and it is not the case anymore that A has a post execution flag

post_execution_update_after_authorizatio.description: post execution update for a settlement case A using a communication channel B and a validation service C after authorization
preconditions: I can only post execution update for a settlement case A using a communication channel B and a validation service C after authorization if it is the case that A is authorized and the approval for A is recorded and the originating ledger for A is allocated and A is bound to the communication channel B and the validation service C is available
I can only post execution update for a settlement case A using a communication channel B and a validation service C after authorization if it is not the case that A has been validated
effects: Once I post execution update for a settlement case A using a communication channel B and a validation service C after authorization, it is the case that A has been validated

mark_ready_for_posting.description: mark a settlement case A ready for posting via a communication channel B
preconditions: I can only mark a settlement case A ready for posting via a communication channel B if it is the case that the approval for A is recorded and A has been validated and A is bound to the communication channel B
I can only mark a settlement case A ready for posting via a communication channel B if it is not the case that A has an approval flag and it is not the case that A is ready for posting
effects: Once I mark a settlement case A ready for posting via a communication channel B, it is the case that A is ready for posting

mark_ready_for_posting_with_manual_appro.description: mark a settlement case A ready for posting with an approval token B
preconditions: I can only mark a settlement case A ready for posting with an approval token B if it is the case that the approval for A is recorded and A has been validated and the approval token B is available
I can only mark a settlement case A ready for posting with an approval token B if it is not the case that A has an approval flag and it is not the case that A is ready for posting
effects: Once I mark a settlement case A ready for posting with an approval token B, it is the case that A is ready for posting
Once I mark a settlement case A ready for posting with an approval token B, it is not the case anymore that the approval token B is available

bind_outgoing_case_to_endpoint.description: bind outgoing case for a settlement case A to a correspondent endpoint B
preconditions: I can only bind outgoing case for a settlement case A to a correspondent endpoint B if it is the case that A is ready for posting and the correspondent endpoint B is available and A allows the outgoing case endpoint B
effects: Once I bind outgoing case for a settlement case A to a correspondent endpoint B, it is the case that the outgoing case endpoint for A is bound to B
Once I bind outgoing case for a settlement case A to a correspondent endpoint B, it is not the case anymore that the correspondent endpoint B is available

bind_incoming_to_outgoing_endpoint.description: bind an incoming case A to a correspondent endpoint C for an outgoing case B
preconditions: I can only bind an incoming case A to a correspondent endpoint C for an outgoing case B if it is the case that A is a registered case and A is incoming and the incoming case A is allowed at the correspondent endpoint C and the outgoing case endpoint for B is bound to C
I can only bind an incoming case A to a correspondent endpoint C for an outgoing case B if it is not the case that the incoming case A is bound to the correspondent endpoint C
effects: Once I bind an incoming case A to a correspondent endpoint C for an outgoing case B, it is the case that the incoming case A is bound to the correspondent endpoint C

set_routing_processing_flag.description: set routing processing flag for a settlement case A using a communication channel B and a validation service C
preconditions: I can only set routing processing flag for a settlement case A using a communication channel B and a validation service C if it is the case that A is a registered case and A is incoming and A has been validated and A is ready for posting and A is bound to the communication channel B and the validation service C is available
I can only set routing processing flag for a settlement case A using a communication channel B and a validation service C if it is not the case that the case routing for A is confirmed
effects: Once I set routing processing flag for a settlement case A using a communication channel B and a validation service C, it is the case that the case routing for A is confirmed

finalize_outgoing_case.description: finalize outgoing a settlement case A
preconditions: I can only finalize outgoing a settlement case A if it is the case that A is outgoing and A is a registered case and the originating ledger for A is allocated and the execution for A is scheduled and the approval for A is recorded and A is ready for posting and A has been validated
I can only finalize outgoing a settlement case A if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize outgoing a settlement case A, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_case_with_endpoint.description: finalize a settlement case A with a correspondent endpoint B
preconditions: I can only finalize a settlement case A with a correspondent endpoint B if it is the case that A is incoming and A is a registered case and the originating ledger for A is allocated and the execution for A is scheduled and the approval for A is recorded and A is ready for posting and A has been validated and the incoming case A is bound to the correspondent endpoint B
I can only finalize a settlement case A with a correspondent endpoint B if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize a settlement case A with a correspondent endpoint B, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_incoming_case.description: finalize incoming a settlement case A
preconditions: I can only finalize incoming a settlement case A if it is the case that A is incoming and A is a registered case and the originating ledger for A is allocated and the execution for A is scheduled and the approval for A is recorded and A is ready for posting and A has been validated and the case routing for A is confirmed
I can only finalize incoming a settlement case A if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize incoming a settlement case A, it is the case that A is finalized

action_nl_templates.create_settlement_case: create settlement case {?settlement_case} as a registered case
action_nl_templates.allocate_originating_ledger: allocate originating ledger {?originating_ledger} to settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates.release_originating_ledger: release originating ledger {?originating_ledger} from settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates.bind_communication_channel: bind communication channel {?communication_channel} to settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates.unbind_communication_channel: unbind communication channel {?communication_channel} from settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates.confirm_channel_binding: confirm the binding of communication channel {?communication_channel} for settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates.apply_approval_and_mark_channel: apply approval token {?approval_token} and mark the communication channel for settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates.run_validation_service: run validation service {?validation_service} for settlement case {?settlement_case} using communication channel {?communication_channel}
action_nl_templates.run_endpoint_validation: run endpoint validation for settlement case {?settlement_case} using correspondent endpoint {?correspondent_endpoint}
action_nl_templates.reserve_beneficiary_correspondent: reserve beneficiary correspondent {?beneficiary_correspondent} for settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates.release_beneficiary_correspondent: release beneficiary correspondent {?beneficiary_correspondent} from settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_nostro_account: reserve nostro account {?nostro_account} for settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates.release_nostro_account: release nostro account {?nostro_account} from settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_currency_route: reserve currency route {?currency_route} for settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates.release_currency_route: release currency route {?currency_route} from settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates.schedule_execution_on_rail: schedule execution for settlement case {?settlement_case} on settlement rail {?settlement_rail} using currency {?currency} with beneficiary correspondent {?beneficiary_correspondent}
action_nl_templates.schedule_execution_with_liquidity: schedule execution for settlement case {?settlement_case} on settlement rail {?settlement_rail} using nostro account {?nostro_account} with liquidity reserve slot {?liquidity_reserve_slot}
action_nl_templates.record_validation_and_block: record validation and block for settlement case {?settlement_case} with currency {?currency} and beneficiary correspondent {?beneficiary_correspondent}
action_nl_templates.capture_manual_approval: capture manual approval for settlement case {?settlement_case} using currency {?currency}, beneficiary correspondent {?beneficiary_correspondent}, and routing profile domestic {?routing_profile_domestic}
action_nl_templates.capture_compliance_and_approval: capture compliance and approval for settlement case {?settlement_case} using nostro account {?nostro_account}, currency route {?currency_route}, and routing profile international {?routing_profile_international}
action_nl_templates.authorize_settlement: authorize settlement for settlement case {?settlement_case} with currency {?currency} and beneficiary correspondent {?beneficiary_correspondent}
action_nl_templates.post_execution_update_after_authorizatio: post execution update for settlement case {?settlement_case} using communication channel {?communication_channel} and validation service {?validation_service} after authorization
action_nl_templates.mark_ready_for_posting: mark settlement case {?settlement_case} ready for posting via communication channel {?communication_channel}
action_nl_templates.mark_ready_for_posting_with_manual_appro: mark settlement case {?settlement_case} ready for posting with approval token {?approval_token}
action_nl_templates.bind_outgoing_case_to_endpoint: bind outgoing case for settlement case {?settlement_case} to correspondent endpoint {?correspondent_endpoint}
action_nl_templates.bind_incoming_to_outgoing_endpoint: bind incoming case {?incoming_case} to correspondent endpoint {?correspondent_endpoint} for outgoing case {?outgoing_case}
action_nl_templates.set_routing_processing_flag: set routing processing flag for settlement case {?settlement_case} using communication channel {?communication_channel} and validation service {?validation_service}
action_nl_templates.finalize_case_with_endpoint: finalize settlement case {?settlement_case} with correspondent endpoint {?correspondent_endpoint}

predicate_nl_templates.case_allocated_originating_ledger: {?settlement_case} is allocated to the originating ledger {?originating_ledger}
predicate_nl_templates.case_originating_ledger_allocated: the originating ledger for {?settlement_case} is allocated
predicate_nl_templates.case_communication_channel_ready: the communication channel for {?settlement_case} is ready
predicate_nl_templates.incoming_case_endpoint_allowed: the incoming case {?settlement_case} is allowed at the correspondent endpoint {?correspondent_endpoint}
predicate_nl_templates.incoming_case_endpoint_bound: the incoming case {?settlement_case} is bound to the correspondent endpoint {?correspondent_endpoint}
predicate_nl_templates.case_routing_confirmed: the case routing for {?settlement_case} is confirmed
predicate_nl_templates.case_originating_ledger_allowed: the settlement case {?settlement_case} is allowed for the originating ledger {?originating_ledger}
predicate_nl_templates.case_settlement_rail_allowed: the settlement case {?settlement_case} is allowed for the settlement rail {?settlement_rail}
predicate_nl_templates.case_currency_allowed: the settlement case {?settlement_case} is allowed for the currency {?currency}
predicate_nl_templates.case_correspondent_allowed: the settlement case {?settlement_case} is allowed for the beneficiary correspondent {?beneficiary_correspondent}
predicate_nl_templates.case_nostro_allowed: the settlement case {?settlement_case} is allowed for the nostro account {?nostro_account}
predicate_nl_templates.case_liquidity_slot_allowed: the settlement case {?settlement_case} is allowed for the liquidity reserve slot {?liquidity_reserve_slot}
predicate_nl_templates.case_currency_route_allowed: the settlement case {?settlement_case} is allowed for the currency route {?currency_route}
predicate_nl_templates.case_routing_profile_assigned: the settlement case {?settlement_case} is assigned to the routing profile {?routing_profile}
predicate_nl_templates.outgoing_case_endpoint_bound: the outgoing case endpoint for {?settlement_case} is bound to {?correspondent_endpoint}
predicate_nl_templates.case_communication_channel_bound: {?settlement_case} is bound to the communication channel {?communication_channel}

action_nl_templates_indef.create_settlement_case: create a settlement case {?settlement_case} as a registered case
action_nl_templates_indef.allocate_originating_ledger: allocate an originating ledger {?originating_ledger} to a settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_originating_ledger: release an originating ledger {?originating_ledger} from a settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_communication_channel: bind a communication channel {?communication_channel} to a settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unbind_communication_channel: unbind a communication channel {?communication_channel} from a settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_channel_binding: confirm the binding of a communication channel {?communication_channel} for a settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_approval_and_mark_channel: apply an approval token {?approval_token} and mark the communication channel for a settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.run_validation_service: run a validation service {?validation_service} for a settlement case {?settlement_case} using a communication channel {?communication_channel}
action_nl_templates_indef.run_endpoint_validation: run endpoint validation for a settlement case {?settlement_case} using a correspondent endpoint {?correspondent_endpoint}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_currency_for_case: reserve a currency {?currency} for a settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_currency_for_case: release a currency {?currency} for a settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_beneficiary_correspondent: reserve a beneficiary correspondent {?beneficiary_correspondent} for a settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_beneficiary_correspondent: release a beneficiary correspondent {?beneficiary_correspondent} from a settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_nostro_account: reserve a nostro account {?nostro_account} for a settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_nostro_account: release a nostro account {?nostro_account} from a settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_currency_route: reserve a currency route {?currency_route} for a settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_currency_route: release a currency route {?currency_route} from a settlement case {?settlement_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.schedule_execution_on_rail: schedule execution for a settlement case {?settlement_case} on a settlement rail {?settlement_rail} using a currency {?currency} with a beneficiary correspondent {?beneficiary_correspondent}
action_nl_templates_indef.schedule_execution_with_liquidity: schedule execution for a settlement case {?settlement_case} on a settlement rail {?settlement_rail} using a nostro account {?nostro_account} with a liquidity reserve slot {?liquidity_reserve_slot}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_validation_and_block: record validation and block for a settlement case {?settlement_case} with a currency {?currency} and a beneficiary correspondent {?beneficiary_correspondent}
action_nl_templates_indef.capture_manual_approval: capture manual approval for a settlement case {?settlement_case} using a currency {?currency}, a beneficiary correspondent {?beneficiary_correspondent}, and a routing profile domestic {?routing_profile_domestic}
action_nl_templates_indef.capture_compliance_and_approval: capture compliance and approval for a settlement case {?settlement_case} using a nostro account {?nostro_account}, a currency route {?currency_route}, and a routing profile international {?routing_profile_international}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_settlement: authorize settlement for a settlement case {?settlement_case} with a currency {?currency} and a beneficiary correspondent {?beneficiary_correspondent}
action_nl_templates_indef.post_execution_update_after_authorizatio: post execution update for a settlement case {?settlement_case} using a communication channel {?communication_channel} and a validation service {?validation_service} after authorization
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_ready_for_posting: mark a settlement case {?settlement_case} ready for posting via a communication channel {?communication_channel}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_ready_for_posting_with_manual_appro: mark a settlement case {?settlement_case} ready for posting with an approval token {?approval_token}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_outgoing_case_to_endpoint: bind outgoing case for a settlement case {?settlement_case} to a correspondent endpoint {?correspondent_endpoint}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_incoming_to_outgoing_endpoint: bind an incoming case {?incoming_case} to a correspondent endpoint {?correspondent_endpoint} for an outgoing case {?outgoing_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.set_routing_processing_flag: set routing processing flag for a settlement case {?settlement_case} using a communication channel {?communication_channel} and a validation service {?validation_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_case_with_endpoint: finalize a settlement case {?settlement_case} with a correspondent endpoint {?correspondent_endpoint}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a domain object is also a object

Everything that is a settlement case or a originating ledger or a settlement rail or a beneficiary correspondent or a currency or a nostro account or a communication channel or a approval token or a correspondent endpoint or a validation service or a liquidity reserve slot or a currency route or a routing profile is also a domain object
Everything that is a routing profile domestic or a routing profile international is also a routing profile
Everything that is a outgoing case or a incoming case is also a settlement case
